title: How to Do It Now Because It's Not Going Away
author: Leslie Josel
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A clock face. 12 around the rim. The 6 o'clock is RED. The minute and hour hands point to 6 (NOW). -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1500)" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="320" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="316" fill="none" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1" opacity="0.4"/>
    <g stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2">
      <line x1="0" y1="-330" x2="0" y2="-300"/>
      <line x1="165" y1="-285" x2="150" y2="-260"/>
      <line x1="285" y1="-165" x2="260" y2="-150"/>
      <line x1="320" y1="0" x2="290" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="285" y1="165" x2="260" y2="150"/>
      <line x1="165" y1="285" x2="150" y2="260"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="330" x2="0" y2="300"/>
      <line x1="-165" y1="285" x2="-150" y2="260"/>
      <line x1="-285" y1="165" x2="-260" y2="150"/>
      <line x1="-320" y1="0" x2="-290" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-285" y1="-165" x2="-260" y2="-150"/>
      <line x1="-165" y1="-285" x2="-150" y2="-260"/>
    </g>
    <line x1="0" y1="330" x2="0" y2="300" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="180" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="240" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="10" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <text x="0" y="400" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.18em">NOW</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A clock face with both hands pointing to 6 — NOW. The 6 mark is RED. The whole cover is the moment you stop delaying. 160px weight-500 title at the top.
